hourly_runtime_report.raw:
# Curator Hourly Report Runtime

Telegram delivery: sent
Selected provider: gpt_reserve
Reserve used: True
Blocker: null

telegram_workflow.raw:
name: Telegram Send Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/telegram_send_smoke.trigger'
      - 'scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py'
      - '.github/workflows/telegram-send-smoke.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: telegram-send-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  telegram-send-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check smoke recorder
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py

      - name: Send Telegram smoke message
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/tmp
          if [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt
            printf '{"ok":false,"description":"missing secret"}' > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_response.json
          else
            MESSAGE="BEM-657 | TELEGRAM DELIVERY SMOKE | workflow_runtime"$'

'"Проверка доставки Telegram из GitHub Actions. Если это сообщение получено, bot/chat secrets and sendMessage path work."
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text=${MESSAGE}" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt; else echo "not_sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt; fi
          fi

      - name: Record Telegram smoke result
        run: python3 scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py

      - name: Commit telegra

curator_workflow.raw:
name: Curator Hourly Report

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 * * * *'
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger'
      - 'scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py'
      - 'scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py'
      - '.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: curator-hourly-report
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  curator-hourly-report:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check hourly scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py

      - name: Render canonical hourly report
        run: python3 scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py

      - name: Send Telegram hourly report
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: |
          if [ ! -s governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_message.txt ]; then
            echo "not_sent_empty_message" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt
          elif [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt
          else
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text@governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_message.txt" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "sent" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt; else echo "not_sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt; fi
          fi

      - name: Record de

blocker.message: Workflow YAML is fixed. If result files are still absent, GitHub push-trigger may not have completed yet or needs manual workflow_dispatch.
